description: The D'Agostino are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Reggio Calabria, Italy, with branches in Rosarno, Laureana di Borrello, Sant'Ilario dello Ionio, and Canolo. They are historically powerful, acting as a link between Reggio and Locri clans and representing the 'Ndrangheta within Cosa Nostra in the 1970s. They have been involved in international drug trafficking and feuds, such as the Faida di Laureana and Faida di Sant'Ilario. Many members are currently imprisoned, but the organization remains active.
